about_item: Give Your Pet Deep, Restful Sleep: Our travel bed is designed to provide soothing comfort for large dogs up to 80 lbs. With its high-loft polyester batting and smooth fabric cushioning, it supports your pet's body to help ease pressure points and promote peaceful sleep, so your best friend wakes up relaxed and refreshed.

A Perfect Fit For Every Sleep Style: Don't settle for a rigid, one-size-fits-all bed. Measuring 39"L x 27"W x 2"H, our open-style travel dog bed gives your pets plenty of room to rest in a variety of positions. Its low-profile, packable form makes it ideal for use at home, in crates, or on the go.

Wash It, Dry It, Done: A dirty pet bed can quickly pick up dirt after outdoor adventures. Our large travel dog bed is fully machine washable for effortless cleanup. This allows you to easily shake off debris from the polyester shell or toss it in the wash, keeping your pet's resting spot fresh, clean, and ready for the next trip.

Invest In Comfort That's Built To Last: This isn't just another travel mat that wears out after a few uses. Built with durable, lightweight polyester material and quilted with high-loft batting, it provides cushioned comfort and insulation from the cold, hard ground, making them perfect for travel, camping, and outdoor adventures.

Fits Your Pet, Your Home & Your Life: We believe a dog bed should fit your space and your adventures, not get in the way. We designed this travel-ready washable dog bed to be lightweight, packable, and easy to use. Whether nestled in a dog crate, placed in the living room, or packed for the car, our two convenient sizes fit a wide range of small to large breeds. You get an easy, versatile setup, while your best friend gets a consistent, cozy haven no matter where the day takes them.

features.title: Trail Pup Travel Bed w/ Stuff Sack
features.text: This super cozy pillow bed is designed to provide optimum comfort for pets of all ages. Its lightweight and pliable form actor makes it an ideal lounging choice for indoors, outdoors, and on the road.

features.title: Color: Aqua & Granite Gray
features.text: The reversible two-color sleep surface features quilted polyester batting that stretches along the entire bed, adding high-loft cushioned padding for enhanced cuddling comfort.

features.title: Stuff Sack
features.text: The Trail Pup packable pillow bed comes with a stuff sack for easy storage and enhanced portability. Perfect for picnics and camping trips!

features.title: Perfect for Travel
features.text: The packable pillow bed's lightweight, pliable, and high-loft form factor ensures both convenience and quality comfort for you and your pet.

features.title: Easy to Clean
features.text: Simple shake or brush any dirt or miscellaneous debris off the bed. For a thorough deep clean, the entire bed has been made completely hand AND machine washable for your convenience. Line dry for best results!

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed easy to clean, washing and drying like a dream, and appreciate its portability for travel. The cushioning is soft and fluffy, making it comfortable for pets, and they like its outdoor use, particularly for camping. While some customers say it's large enough for big dogs, others find it too small. The durability receives mixed feedback, with some saying it holds up well while others report thread peeling and rips.

authors_reviews.title: Exactly what I was looking for!
authors_reviews.text: Great product! Used for the first time at my son’s baseball game and it gave my pup a comfy place to lay. It’s very similar to a sleeping bag in material and in taking it on the go. Material is soft and the bag it comes in is easy, light, and small. My dog is about 35-40lb would consider him M size, and this bed (small) was a great size! Exactly what I was looking for. Others I looked at were too big or cumbersome. Would recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Ashley

authors_reviews.title: Effective, easy to wash and handle
authors_reviews.text: I bought three of these for my aging pup who had accidents that had ruined his old beds he'd owned for years. Unfortunately, despite the fact these were advertised as being "washable" when I unzipped them I found that was basically impossible as the stuffing inside was glued in, making it impossible to clean them.These little mats are simple but effective. Like I said, they're easy to wash. They basically feel like the same material as a sleeping bag. My mom has some for her dogs which appeared to have a big more shape to them, and basically be real beds. However it did seem like he was able to sleep in these and must have found them somewhat comfy. Also they always cleaned up real well.I almost am giving it four stars, but I felt bad doing it since it fulfilled my needs. I wish I could give four and a half stars. Why? A few nits: sometimes I think I could have bought my dog better washable begs that had a bit more padding as these were pretty thin. Also a few of them started to fray a bit in the washing machine. The label said to wash them on "delicate" but by the end of my dog's life he was peeing on them almost every day; nobody has time to only put a few dog mats in the washing machine by themselves. Finally it's kind of frustrating that these also come with a travel bag. I'm sick of these trend were cheaper products on Amazon include a bag as if it's some extra value. The bags got dusty and eventually a member of my family ended up throwing them in the trash. I feel bad for sending them to the landfill but I didn't want them!So all in all a great product, but could have been a bit better.
authors_reviews.author: Scott Winston

authors_reviews.title: A Trail-Ready Travel Bed That Delivers Premium Comfort Without the Premium Price
authors_reviews.text: The urHaven Outdoor Travel Dog Bed is one of those products that immediately feels overbuilt in the best way. For a lightweight trail mat, the materials are surprisingly sturdy, and the stitching is tight, even, and clearly designed to handle real-world outdoor use. The outer fabric feels tough enough for dirt, rocks, campsite debris, and the occasional wet ground, yet still soft enough that dogs settle in quickly.What impressed me most was the balance between packability and comfort. It folds down easily, stays lightweight, and fits neatly into a backpack or vehicle travel kit. Once opened, it fluffs back into shape without clumping or thin spots. The fill provides just enough cushion to keep a large dog off the cold or uneven ground—more comfort than many pricier travel pads that tend to be too thin or too firm. The only limitation is personal preference: my dog prefers beds with high bolsters, and this mat is intentionally low-profile and streamlined for travel. For dogs who like to stretch out, it’s perfect.Durability feels top tier for the price. Repeated use on dirt, gravel, and picnic areas hasn’t caused fraying or tearing, and cleanup is easy—shake off debris, wipe it down, and it’s ready for the next outing. For the cost, it genuinely rivals well-known outdoor brands charging much more for the same functionality.Use-cases are broad: camping, road trips, hotel stays, backyard lounging, beach days, or simply keeping your dog comfortable at a friend’s house. It’s also a great secondary bed to keep in the car so your dog always has a clean, portable place to rest.Pros• Lightweight and easy to pack• Durable material and strong stitching• Comfortably padded for outdoor terrain• Cleans quickly and resists wear• Excellent value compared to high-end travel matsCons• Dogs who prefer bolster-style beds may want more support around the edgesIf you want a reliable, comfortable, easy-to-travel-with bed for your large dog—without paying premium outdoor-brand prices—the urHaven Trail Pup Travel Mat is a smart, well-made choice that performs exactly as a travel bed should.
authors_reviews.author: Thomas McGee

authors_reviews.title: Great for traveling and camping
authors_reviews.text: Great for traveling and camping. Works both indoor and outdoor. Dogs go right to it and it's easy to clean and doesn't collect much dirt and all (when using outdoors), indoors it's simple and handy.
authors_reviews.author: Maria W.

authors_reviews.title: Nice and soft, easy to clean
authors_reviews.text: This is a nice dog blanket for outdoors. I've used it in the dog stroller too. It's soft and cool fabric that wipes off easily. The dog is too stubborn to use as a bed outside, but I've sat on it plenty and it's comfortable (and pretty!).
authors_reviews.author: LM

authors_reviews.title: Good for travel and in a pinch bed
authors_reviews.text: I have a medium sized dog and I think it was still too small for her. And very thin. It is nice though for a travel bed but I need bigger.
authors_reviews.author: Debra Nelson

authors_reviews.title: It has Survived my Abuse
authors_reviews.text: This bed has survived a lot of abuse and is still in great condition. There have been countless times I've left it out in the rain, and I just had to leave it in the sun, and it'd dry right back up. Its not the softest bed, but when camping it lets my dogs sit on the gravel pads by the campfire without the rocks digging into them.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Nice outdoor mat for pets
authors_reviews.text: My dogs like it. It is soft, easy to clean and foldable to carry for outdoor or in the car.
authors_reviews.author: Pat lool

other_countries_reviews.text: Arrived in their own travel pouch. They are made well but are very thin. It is the thickness of a quilt but in water proof fabric.
other_countries_reviews.author: Louise

other_countries_reviews.title: Tolles Reisebett!
other_countries_reviews.text: Tolles Reisebett, vor allem super für Camping. Unser Hund liebt es .
other_countries_reviews.author: Yvonne Schmitz

other_countries_reviews.title: Exactly what I wanted!
other_countries_reviews.text: I was looking for an oval cushion fo a dog basket, and this fits the bill perfectly. It not too thick and can therefore be machine washed easily. Most of all my Spaniel loves it.
other_countries_reviews.author: Heike

other_countries_reviews.title: Fantastic Outdoors Dog Bed
other_countries_reviews.text: This travel bed has been the best addition to our outdoor adventures. It has durable fabric holds up well against rough surfaces and it comes with a stuff sack, making it super easy to pack and carry. It’s lightweight and fits perfectly in our travel gear.The mat is machine washable, which is a huge plus, I've washed it a few times and it comes out perfectly.Overall, my dog love this convenient bed and I'm happy to carry it everywhere!
other_countries_reviews.author: AT

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect for Services dogs or any dog that travels
other_countries_reviews.text: This is my second purchase. Unfortunately, this was more expensive then my first stuff sack mat. I have a Service Dog and I am now training a puppy to be a service dog for someone else (SDiT). These Mats are easy to carry, easy to take out and put back into the stuff sack. I just washed the 2 mats and their carry bags and they held up great after the washer and dryer. If you take yoir Service Dog to restaurants or just hang out at a Mall/Library/etc. these mats are perfect.
other_countries_reviews.author: Della O'Malley
